title: Imperial junkyard
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
[[File:Imperial_Junkyard.jpg|thumb|250px|The Imperial junkyard]]
The '''Imperial junkyard''' was a junkyard used by both the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as a place to dump [[Starship/Legends|starships]] and vehicles no longer in use due to damage or other reasons.

On his way to help [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Janek Sunber/Legends|Janek "Tank" Sunber]] defect to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] entered this junkyard, which was where Lieutenant Sunber was being held captive.

Vehicles in the junkyard included:
*[[Self-Propelled Heavy Artillery]]
*[[Eta-2 Actis-class interceptor/Legends|Eta-2 ''Actis''-class interceptors]]
*[[T-16 skyhopper/Legends|T-16 skyhoppers]]
*[[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]]
*[[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 ''Aethersprite''-class starfighters]]
*[[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class space cruisers]]
*[[EasyRide passenger airspeeder|Coruscant taxis]]
*[[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ships]]
*[[Droid tri-fighter/Legends|Droid tri-fighters]]
*[[AA-9 Coruscant freighter/Legends|AA-9 Coruscant freighters]]
*[[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]]
*[[TIE/IN interceptor]]s

==Appearances==
*[[Rebellion 3|''Rebellion'' 3]] {{1st}}
*[[Rebellion 4|''Rebellion'' 4]]
